description.value:
A steampunk welding torch resembling a lightsaber hilt, its tip emitting a short jet of blue-white plasma flame. Used to repair and heal Delta Kilo Autarchs by welding damaged plating back into place. When used on a non-Autarch creature, the plasma flame instead burns and damages them.

Construct Mending

The wielder chooses one of three intensity levels when activating the torch, consuming a corresponding number of charges. Charges are recovered on a short rest at a rate of the wielder's character level divided by 3 (rounded down), and fully restored on a long rest.

LevelChargesFormula
112d6 + spellcasting modifier + proficiency bonus
222d8 + spellcasting modifier + proficiency bonus
332d10 + spellcasting modifier + proficiency bonus

If the wielder has no spellcasting ability, the spellcasting modifier is treated as +0. If the target is a Delta Kilo Autarch, the result heals the target's Hit Points. If the target is not an Autarch, the result instead deals fire damage to the target.

description.chatFlavor: Smelters Edge is applied to weld and repair the target's plating.
